Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Achraf Ouchen vs. Elhadji Ndour
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Achraf Ouchen vs. Elhadji Ndour

Video.summary: Coming from a history of drinking heavily and drug abuse, Nick Burnham was able to turn his life around completely by prioritizing his MMA training. Now, at HK38, Nick is looking to take the Lightweight title away from Dauda Keita in a fight that goes the distance!
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham
Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham
Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham

Best of 'Shock N Awe' Finishes
Best of 'Shock N Awe' Finishes

Video.summary: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Jaclyn Madarasz as we delve into the life of a coach.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Coach - Jaclyn Madarasz
Video.title: Day in the Life of a Coach - Jaclyn Madarasz

Image.alt: Day in the Life of a Coach - Jaclyn Madarasz
Day in the Life of a Coach - Jaclyn Madarasz
Day in the Life of a Coach - Jaclyn Madarasz

Video.summary: Live from Miami Beach on April 26, 2018, Karate Combat: Inception is the first event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held as a private, invite-only spectacle, this video stream will show all of the key fighters, as it happens. Featured on the Main Card: Elhadji "Black Magic" Ndour of the United States versus Andras “The Titan” Virag, a game contender from Hungary. The co-main event features Dionicio Gustavo of the Dominican Republic versus France's Alexandre Bouderbane in a key contest. Other fighters include Adham Sabry of the USA, Spyros Margaritopoulos of Greece, and Joshua Quayhagen from the USA.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION
KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION
KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Zac Chalmers at HK40.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers
Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers
Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers

Video.summary: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Josh Griffin
Video.grandparentTitle: Fighter Profile: Josh Griffin
Video.title: Fighter Profile: Josh Griffin

Image.alt: Fighter Profile: Josh Griffin
Fighter Profile: Josh Griffin
Fighter Profile: Josh Griffin

Video.summary: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
